_meta.description: Every parameter change MUST be logged here with date, reason, and data backing. Claude MUST check this before making any strategy changes. Never change parameters without recording here first.
rules: 2. Check last 3 daily reports for performance data
3. Log the change HERE with before/after values + reason
5. Only then modify the actual code

changes.description: Strategy tracker system created. All current parameters recorded in strategy_registry.json as baseline.
changes.author: Claude (system audit)
changes.data_backing: 30-day paper + live trade analysis. See daily/2026-03-18.json for today's performance.

changes.reason: 5 of 12 SL hits in last 5 days were within normal noise range (<1% from entry). 33-min SL hit on UNITDSPR today. Tight SLs cause premature exits before trade can develop.
changes.data_backing: 30-day: SL_HIT accounts for -₹11,866 of losses (12 trades). Avg time-to-SL = 28 min. Today: UNITDSPR SL hit in 33 min, only 1% move.
changes.expected_impact: Reduce premature SL hits by ~50%, accept slightly larger losses on true reversals
changes.rollback_trigger: If avg loss per trade doubles over next 5 days without win rate improvement

changes.reason: Futures 1.5x ATR with 0.5% floor causes whipsaws. BAJFINANCE SL hit at ₹878.70 (1.2% from entry) in 1h41m. Normal futures intraday noise is 1-1.5%.
changes.data_backing: Today: BAJFINANCE -₹5,462 SL hit, NESTLEIND -₹1,290 square-off. Both SELL in bullish market with tight SLs.
changes.expected_impact: Wider SLs give futures trades room. Combined with P0-003 (risk reduction), max loss per trade stays controlled.
changes.rollback_trigger: If futures avg loss exceeds ₹3,000 per trade over 5 days

changes.reason: 5% risk per trade = single trade can wipe 5.5% of capital. BAJFINANCE today: 500 qty, -₹5,462 (5.5%). Institutional standard is 1-2%.
changes.data_backing: Today: 1 futures SL hit triggered daily loss limit. 500 qty on BAJFINANCE at 5% risk. NESTLEIND 675 qty (27 lots) is extreme.
changes.expected_impact: Max single-trade loss drops from ~₹5,000 to ~₹2,000. Smaller positions, more controlled drawdown.
changes.rollback_trigger: N/A — this is a permanent risk management improvement

changes.reason: Zero strategies have volume confirmation. Signals fire on low-volume moves that reverse immediately. Every quant textbook requires volume to confirm price action.
changes.data_backing: 30-day: 44-46% win rate across strategies. Many SL hits on low-conviction moves. Play2 generated 32 trades with -₹5,531 P&L — bulk were noise.
changes.expected_impact: Filter ~30-40% of noise signals. Remaining signals have higher conviction.
changes.rollback_trigger: If signal count drops below 3 per day on paper trader (too restrictive)

changes.before: Sort by reward/risk ratio (all strategies produce 1:2, so effectively random)
changes.after: Conviction score: volume_ratio × ADX_strength × trend_alignment. Higher score = picked first.
changes.reason: Current ranking picks stocks with widest SL/target spread, not highest probability. Today: DEVYANI (₹109) selected over higher-quality signals — didn't move at all.
changes.data_backing: Today: 24 signals from scan #1, 100 from scan #2 — only 2 picked per scan. DEVYANI (low-priced, low-momentum) wasted a slot for 2.5 hours.
changes.expected_impact: Better trade selection from available signals. Higher average win size.
changes.rollback_trigger: If win rate drops below 40% over 5 days

changes.before: Iron condor placed in any regime including 'neutral' regardless of VIX
changes.after: Block iron condor when VIX > 16. Only allow when VIX <= 16 AND regime is 'neutral'
changes.reason: Iron condor requires range-bound, low-vol market. Today: VIX=19 + bullish trend → CE leg breached → -₹1,562 loss destroyed 3 put spread wins.
changes.data_backing: Today: 1 iron condor at VIX 19 → -₹1,562. 3 bull_put_spreads → +₹1,212. Net options: -₹721. Without IC, would have been +₹841.
changes.expected_impact: Eliminate iron condor losses in trending/volatile markets
changes.rollback_trigger: If no iron condors placed for 10+ consecutive days (too restrictive)

changes.before: SOFT filter — boosts score but does NOT block counter-sentiment trades
changes.after: HARD filter — block BUY when sentiment is 'short_buildup' or 'long_unwinding', block SELL when 'long_buildup' or 'short_covering'
changes.reason: Futures traded SELL on BAJFINANCE with 'long_unwinding' sentiment. Smart money was exiting longs = bearish, but stock went UP. OI alone shouldn't drive direction in bullish regime.
changes.data_backing: Today: Both futures trades had 'long_unwinding' OI but market was bullish. Both lost. -₹6,752 total.
changes.expected_impact: Prevent counter-sentiment futures trades. May reduce signal count by 30-40%.
changes.rollback_trigger: If futures signal count drops below 1 per day

changes.reason: 60-second checks miss SL/target hits between checks. On 5m candles, only 5 LTP checks per candle. Today: SBICARD target was at ₹710.05 but exited at ₹710.35 (lucked out). Could easily miss by 60 seconds and have price reverse.
changes.data_backing: Today: 4 intraday trades monitored every 60s. Options already use 15s interval (correctly).
changes.expected_impact: 3x more frequent price checks. Better SL/target execution.
changes.rollback_trigger: If API rate limiting causes LTP fetch failures

changes.before: Regime detected ONCE at engine start, strategies fixed for entire session
changes.after: Re-detect regime on every scan cycle. If regime changes, update strategy list dynamically.
changes.reason: Today: regime was 'neutral' at 10 AM, shifted to 'mildly_bullish' by noon. Strategies selected at start didn't adapt. SELL signals ran in bullish market.
changes.data_backing: Mar 18: UNITDSPR SELL hit SL in 33 min (counter-trend). Market shifted bullish mid-day but engine kept running neutral-regime strategies.
changes.expected_impact: Strategies adapt to intraday regime shifts. Fewer counter-trend trades.
changes.rollback_trigger: If regime flapping causes > 3 strategy switches per day (add cooldown)

changes.parameter: REGIME_STRATEGY_MAP — add Play4 to pullback/bounce, remove Play2 from top slots
changes.before: Play4 Supertrend only in bullish/bearish. Play2 Triple MA in 6+ regimes.
changes.after: Play4 added to pullback/bounce/neutral regimes on 15m. Play2 removed from bullish/bearish (kept only as low-vol fallback).
changes.reason: Play4 is best performer (+₹4,133, 52% WR) but excluded from 8/20 regimes. Play2 is worst (-₹5,531, 44% WR) but in most common regimes.
changes.data_backing: 30-day: Play4 +₹4,133 (23 trades). Play2 -₹5,531 (32 trades). Play4 Supertrend pullback entry works in non-trending markets too.
changes.expected_impact: Best strategy gets more opportunities. Worst strategy stops wasting capital slots.
changes.rollback_trigger: If Play4 win rate drops below 40% in pullback regimes over 5 days

changes.before: VIX binary: >20=high, <14=low, else normal. No confidence score.
changes.after: Added 'elevated' zone (16-20): max positions halved. Intraday direction uses magnitude for confidence (0.3% vs 1.5% treated differently).
changes.reason: VIX 14.1 and 19.9 both treated as 'normal' but are very different. Today VIX=19 should have triggered caution.
changes.data_backing: Mar 18: VIX=19, iron condor placed in 'neutral' regime → -₹1,562. Iron condor now blocked by P1-002, but other strategies still over-allocated.
changes.expected_impact: More conservative position sizing in uncertain volatility. Fewer slots used when conviction is low.
changes.rollback_trigger: If daily trade count drops below 2 (too restrictive)

changes.reason: 12 PM start misses best 2 hours of intraday volume (10-12). By 12 PM, big moves are done. Options already start at 10 AM with 75% win rate on spreads. 10:30 gives 15m charts 5+ candles to stabilize.
changes.data_backing: Mar 18: Options (10 AM start) had 75% WR on bull_put_spreads. Equity (12 PM start) got weaker signals. Trading window doubles from 2h to 3.5h (equity) and 3h (futures).
changes.expected_impact: More trading opportunities. Better signals during high-volume morning session. Trading window: equity 10:30-2:00 (3.5h), futures 11:00-2:00 (3h).
changes.rollback_trigger: If morning trades (10:30-12:00) have significantly worse win rate than afternoon (12:00-2:00) over 5 days
